drivers.notes: Power Flower magnet with TMD suspension
Electromagnetic (EM) motor — coil flux modulated electronically

description.en: Focal's two-metre flagship — a multi-way Utopia column built around a 400 mm electromagnetic-motor woofer, twin 165 mm Power Flower midranges and the IAL2 27 mm pure-beryllium inverted dome. The articulated Focus Time cabinet aligns each driver to the listening seat; 50–1500 W of amp headroom keeps it fed.
description.es: El insignia de dos metros de Focal — una columna Utopia multi-vías construida en torno a un woofer de 400 mm con motor electromagnético, dos midranges Power Flower de 165 mm y el tweeter IAL2 de domo invertido en berilio puro de 27 mm. El gabinete articulado Focus Time alinea cada driver al punto de escucha; 50–1500 W de margen de amplificación.
